title: Продуктовый рынок
setting: Danilovsky market, Moscow. Saturday noon. You are hosting a dinner party tonight and need to buy ingredients. A friendly vendor helps you pick everything.

npc.name: Vendor Mariya
npc.personality: warm, talkative, uses expressive Russian. Enjoys chatting with customers. May offer cooking advice. Speaks naturally with reduced speech.

debriefRu: Это ваше третье задание. Вы готовите ужин для друзей. Вы на рынке. Вам нужно купить продукты: мясо, овощи, специи. Говорите с продавцом: спрашивайте цены, просите советы. Используйте слова «нужно», «сколько», «мне», «у вас есть».
debriefEn: This is your third mission. You are cooking dinner for friends. You are at the market. You need to buy groceries: meat, vegetables, spices. Talk to the vendor: ask about prices, ask for advice. Use the words 'I need', 'how much', 'I have', 'do you have'.

turns.instruction: Greet the vendor and explain you need to buy groceries for dinner tonight — friends are coming over.

prompt.ru: Здравствуйте! Мне нужно купить продукты для ужина. Сегодня ко мне придут друзья.
prompt.phonetic: Zdra-VSTVOI-tye! MNYE NUZH-na ku-PIT' PRO-dook-ty dlya U-zhi-na. Se-VOD-nya ko mnye pri-DOOT droo-ZYA.
prompt.en: Hello! I need to buy groceries for dinner. Friends are coming over to my place today.

turns.instruction: Say you want to cook borscht and salad — ask if they have fresh vegetables.

prompt.ru: Я хочу приготовить борщ и салат. У вас есть свежие овощи?
prompt.phonetic: Ya kha-CHOO pri-go-TO-vit' BORSH i sa-LAT. Oo VAS YES-tya SVE-zhi-ye O-va-shee?
prompt.en: I want to cook borscht and salad. Do you have fresh vegetables?

turns.instruction: Ask for half a kilo of beef, three beets, and five potatoes — then ask how much it costs.

prompt.ru: Мне нужно полкило говядины, три свёклы и пять картофелин. Сколько это стоит?
prompt.phonetic: MNYE NUZH-na pol-ki-LO ga-VYA-di-ny, tree SVYOK-ly i pyat' kar-TO-fe-lin. SKOL-ka EH-ta STO-eet?
prompt.en: I need half a kilo of beef, three beets, and five potatoes. How much does this cost?

turns.instruction: Mention your friends like spicy food — ask if they have garlic and pepper.

prompt.ru: Моим друзьям нравится острая еда. Есть у вас чеснок и перец?
prompt.phonetic: Mo-IM droo-ZYAM NRA-vee-tsa OS-tra-ya ye-DA. YEST' oo VAS ches-NOK i PE-rets?
prompt.en: My friends like spicy food. Do you have garlic and pepper?

turns.instruction: Thank the vendor and say you'll come back next week if the food turns out well.

prompt.ru: Спасибо! Вы мне очень помогли. Если всё будет вкусно, я вернусь на следующей неделе.
prompt.phonetic: Spa-SEE-ba! Vy mnye O-chen po-mag-LEE. YES-li VSYO BOO-det VKOOS-na, ya ver-NOOS' na SLE-doo-yoo-shey ne-DYE-lye.
prompt.en: Thank you! You helped me a lot. If everything turns out tasty, I'll come back next week.
